## Summary

Briefly describe the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new functionality
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `test` — tests added or updated
- [ ] `docs` — documentation-only change
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructure without intended behaviour change
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance / cleanup
- [ ] `exp` — experimental work

## Branch type

- [ ] `feature/...`
- [ ] `fix/...`
- [ ] `docs/...`
- [ ] `exp/...`

## Changes to `hpe_vip_core`

Does this PR change shared preprocessing code in `hpe_vip_core`?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes

If yes, briefly explain:

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?
- Does it change the model input format?
- Could it affect both training and ROS2 runtime behaviour?

## Testing

What tests or checks were run?

```text
Replace with commands or notes.
```

## PR checklist

- [ ] The PR is focused on one clear task.
- [ ] The branch is up to date with `main`.
- [ ] Required GitHub Actions tests pass.
- [ ] Documentation was updated if setup, launch, topics, messages, preprocessing, or model-input assumptions changed.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where appropriate.
- [ ] No generated build folders, datasets, pickle files, checkpoints, exported models, or local environment files were committed.
- [ ] No personal absolute paths were hardcoded.
